name: Hummous Bi Tahini
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse the chick-peas.
2. Mince the garlic in a processor first.
3. Add chickpeas, olive oil, tahini, lemon juice, salt, pepper, cumin, and vitamin C to the processor.
4. Process until the mixture is completely smooth.
5. Serve chilled or at room temperature with pita bread or crackers.
6. Garnish with paprika, olives, and parsley.
7. Lemon juice may be replaced with 1/2 tsp citric acid dissolved in 6 oz hot water.
